template_data.headline_html: Five tasks that keep your Schedule alive.

items.title: Renew SAM.gov registration
items.sub: Expires every 12 months — lapse freezes payments cold

items.title: Accept Mass Modifications
items.sub: Ignoring mass mods puts you in contract violation

items.title: Audit for price reduction liability
items.sub: Lower commercial rates may trigger a refund obligation

items.title: Update GSA Advantage pricelist
items.sub: Stale pricelists cost you RFQs you never even see

items.title: File Annual Sales Report by Nov 30
items.sub: Miss this and GSA can terminate for cause

template_data.image_headline: FIVE TASKS YOUR SCHEDULE NEEDS ANNUALLY.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic alert layout on dark navy background. Bold warning headline top: 'FIVE TASKS YOUR SCHEDULE NEEDS' with a caution triangle icon. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer holding a clipboard, serious expression. Right side: 5 checklist rows stacked vertically, each with a green checkmark icon and a short 2-3 word label — 'SAM RENEWAL', 'MASS MODS', 'PRICE AUDIT', 'PRICELIST UPDATE', 'SALES REPORT'. Bottom dark banner with bold white text: 'EVERY YEAR. NO EXCEPTIONS.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
